name: mcnp-linter
description: Language server-based linter for MCNP input files

mcnpLinter.dataPath.description: Path to MCNP cross-section data directory (containing xsdir).

mcnpLinter.validateOnType.description: Validate MCNP input as you type.

mcnpLinter.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for validation.

mcnpLinter.materialDisplay.description: How to display material components in hover: 'isotope' (U-235) or 'zaid' (92235.80c).

mcnpLinter.resolveReadFiles.description: Parse files referenced by READ cards and include their contents in validation.

mcnpLinter.suppressChecks.description: List of check numbers to suppress. Example: [4, 33] suppresses 'plausible mass number' and 'unused surface' warnings.

mcnpLinter.warnLineLength.description: Warn when input lines exceed 80 columns. Enable for workflows targeting older MCNP versions.

mcnpLinter.codeLens.enabled.description: Show reference counts above cell, surface, and material definitions.

mcnpLinter.inlayHints.surfaceTypes.description: Show surface type mnemonics (SO, CZ, etc.) as inlay hints next to surface references in cell geometry.

mcnpLinter.semanticTokens.enabled.description: Enable semantic token highlighting for cell numbers, surface references, material IDs, and keywords.

mcnpLinter.callHierarchy.enabled.description: Enable call hierarchy for FILL/U universe nesting navigation.

mcnpLinter.selectionRanges.enabled.description: Enable smart selection ranges that expand from token to line to card to block.

mcnpLinter.asciiSurfaceArt.description: Show ASCII art diagrams for surface types in hover tooltips.

mcnpLinter.formatter.preset.description: Formatter preset. 'default': modern MCNP6 style (5-space indent). 'legacy': 80-column limit with & continuations.

mcnpLinter.formatter.continuationStyle.description: Continuation line style. 'indent': 5+ space indent (§4.4.6). 'ampersand': trailing & marker.

mcnpLinter.formatter.continuationIndent.description: Number of spaces for continuation line indent (minimum 5 per MCNP spec §4.4.6).

mcnpLinter.formatter.maxLineLength.description: Maximum line length. 0 = no wrapping. Maximum 128 per MCNP spec (§3.2.2).

mcnpLinter.formatter.tabHandling.description: Tab handling. 'convert': expand to spaces at MCNP's 8-char tab stops (§3.2.2). 'preserve': leave as-is.

mcnpLinter.formatter.maxConsecutiveBlank.description: Maximum consecutive blank lines allowed within a block.

mcnpLinter.formatter.keywordSpacing.description: Spacing around = in KEYWORD=value pairs. 'compact': KEY=val. 'spaced': KEY = val. 'preserve': leave as-is.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignCellColumns.description: Align cell card columns (ID, material, density, geometry) across consecutive cells.

mcnpLinter.formatter.normalizeGeometrySp.description: Normalize whitespace in cell geometry expressions to single spaces.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignSurfaceColumns.description: Align surface card columns (ID, transform, mnemonic, parameters) across consecutive surfaces.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignSurfaceParamet.description: Align numeric parameters across consecutive surfaces of the same type.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignMaterialCompon.description: Align ZAID and fraction columns in material cards.

mcnpLinter.formatter.materialComponentTh.description: Number of ZAID+fraction pairs above which material components are formatted one per line.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignTallyBins.description: Align values in energy, time, and cosine bin cards.

mcnpLinter.formatter.alignInlineComments.description: Align inline $ comments to a target column.

mcnpLinter.formatter.inlineCommentColumn.description: Target column for inline comment alignment (when alignInlineComments is enabled).

scripts.build:tsc: npm run build:tsc:client && npm run build:tsc:server
